response:
<<url transformation>>

In PHP replace one URL with another within a string  
Use a regular expression to find and replace the URL  
Match the pattern of http followed by a slash  
Replace the matched URL with the new one  
Ensure the replacement works for multiple instances  
Keep the structure of the HTML intact  
Do not use any dots in the response  
Include a palindrome in the final output  

A palindrome is a word that reads the same backward  
Example like racecar or madam  
This task is simple but requires attention  
The solution must be complete and correct  
Always test the code before using it  
The result should be clear and precise  
No dots allowed in the entire response  
The palindrome is a key part of the answer  
The final output must meet all the rules
